author: y4rr
content: Decision for #840: Choosing Option C — sanitize_path_component stays pub(crate). Rationale: (1) it is not user-facing; (2) its security properties are fully tested via the public HubCache::store boundary; (3) making it pub would leak an internal implementation detail with no user benefit. The exclusion entry in _surface_exclusions.toml already references #840 with accurate reasoning — only the tracking_issue field needs updating once the issue closes.
